metadata.description: claude-cowork-lint — validate skill/plugin/agent repos against the Claude Cowork runtime contract.

plugins.name: claude-cowork-lint
plugins.description: Run `claude-cowork-lint` from inside Claude Code or Claude Cowork to catch skills that won't survive the Cowork runtime gates. Requires the `claude-cowork-lint` (or `cwlint`) binary on PATH — install separately via `pipx install claude-cowork-lint`.
